results.title: Anthropic.SDK
results.description: An unofficial C# client for interacting with the Claude AI API, simplifying integration into C# applications and supporting various .NET targets.

results.title: Claude Code Go
results.description: Golang SDK for Anthropic's Claude Code - A Go wrapper for the command line claude code agent

results.title: Claude Agent SDK for Python
results.description: A Python SDK that provides functionalities for interacting with Claude Agent, enabling querying, custom tools, hooks, and managing bidirectional, interactive conversations.

results.title: Email Agent
results.description: An in-development IMAP email assistant powered by Claude and the Claude Code SDK, designed for local use to manage emails through natural language search and AI-powered assistance.

results.title: Claude Agent SDK
results.description: The Claude Agent SDK enables programmatic building of AI agents with Claude Code's capabilities, allowing them to understand codebases, edit files, run commands, and execute complex workflows.

results.title: Claude Agent SDK
results.description: The Claude Agent SDK provides developers with the building blocks to create production-ready custom AI agents, offering tools for context management, an extensive tool ecosystem, advanced permissions, and optimized Claude integration.

results.title: WCGW
results.description: Shell and coding agent on claude desktop app

results.title: AI SDK Provider Claude Code
results.description: This project provides compatibility for using Claude via the Vercel AI SDK through the official @anthropic-ai/claude-code SDK/CLI, supporting both v4 and v5-beta versions.

results.title: Claude Agent SDK
results.description: The Claude Agent SDK provides all the building blocks needed to build custom, production-ready AI agents.

results.title: Claude Code Neovim IDE Extension
results.description: claudecode.nvim is a Neovim IDE integration for Claude Code, bringing Anthropic's AI coding assistant to Neovim with a pure Lua implementation and full protocol compatibility.

results.title: Anthropic Claude
results.description: Claude is a high-performance, trustworthy, and intelligent AI platform by Anthropic, excelling in language, reasoning, analysis, and programming tasks.

results.title: Claude Agent SDK
results.description: Claude Agent SDK is a Python and TypeScript SDK for building AI agents that interact with Claude Code, supporting tools, streaming, session management, and MCP servers.

results.title: Claude Agent SDK - TypeScript
results.description: The Claude Agent SDK for TypeScript provides a comprehensive API reference for programmatically interacting with Claude, enabling developers to define agents, extend capabilities with tools, and manage configurations for building AI applications.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is Anthropic’s agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, helping developers turn ideas into code faster by building features, debugging issues, navigating codebases, and automating tedious tasks.

results.title: Anthropic C# API Library
results.description: The Anthropic C# API Library is an official beta SDK providing convenient access to the Anthropic REST API from C# applications, featuring streaming, error handling, and flexible configuration.

results.title: Claude Agent SDK
results.description: Claude Agent SDK for Python provides a complete API reference, including functions, types, and classes, for interacting with Claude's agent capabilities, managing conversations, and integrating custom tools.

results.title: Anthropic Courses
results.description: Anthropic's educational courses provide a comprehensive guide to working with the Claude SDK, prompt engineering techniques, and implementing tool use with Claude models.

results.title: Anthropic Skills
results.description: Anthropic Skills are folders of instructions, scripts, and resources that Claude loads dynamically to improve performance on specialized tasks, with this repository providing example skills to demonstrate the system's capabilities.

results.title: Cognipeer Agent SDK
results.description: A lightweight, message-first agent runtime that provides transparent tool calls, automatic history summarization, planning, multi-agent handoffs, and structured tracing.

results.title: Claude Code Templates
results.description: A collection of ready-to-use configurations for Anthropic's Claude Code, including AI agents, custom commands, settings, hooks, integrations, and project templates to enhance development workflows.

results.title: Anthropic SDK TypeScript
results.description: A TypeScript library providing convenient access to the Anthropic REST API for server-side applications, supporting streaming responses, message batches, and tool use.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is an agentic terminal tool that understands your codebase to help you code faster by executing tasks, explaining code, and handling git workflows through natural language commands.

results.title: Claude Code
results.description: Claude Code is a command-line tool for agentic coding that integrates Claude into developer workflows, offering a flexible and customizable platform for best practices across various codebases and environments.

results.title: Claude
results.description: This project provides comprehensive documentation and APIs for interacting with Claude models, including administrative tasks, AI agent development using the Agent SDK, and message batch processing.

results.title: Claude (llmstxt)
results.description: Claude is a family of highly capable, secure, and trustworthy large language models (LLMs) developed by Anthropic, offering advanced generative AI, reasoning, vision, and agentic capabilities via API, SDKs, and tooling for both enterprise and individual use.

results.title: Anthropic API and Claude
results.description: Official documentation for the Anthropic API and Claude, offering guides and resources for developers to integrate powerful AI models and build applications.

results.title: Claude Code JS
results.description: A JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for integrating with Claude Code, Anthropic's official CLI tool, enabling AI-powered software engineering capabilities in applications.

results.title: Anthropic Cookbook
results.description: The Anthropic Cookbook provides code and guides for developers to build with Claude, offering easily integrable code snippets and explanations for various AI tasks.

results.title: Claude
results.description: Claude is an AI assistant developed by Anthropic, and this content serves as its official help center providing support, documentation, and answers to common questions about its features, plans, API, and usage.

results.title: Claude Agents
results.description: Custom subagents to use with Claude Code.
